# LARGESTACK Agentic AI

> v1.0 release-candidate Python framework for governed agentic AI.

LARGESTACK is an open-source (Apache 2.0) Python framework for building AI agents with typed dependency injection, 15-layer guardrails, native MCP/A2A/AG-UI protocols, and built-in observability.

## Install

```bash
pip install largestack
```

## Quick Start

```python
from dataclasses import dataclass
from largestack.decorators import Agent, RunContext

@dataclass
class Deps:
    user_id: str

agent = Agent[Deps, str]("openai/gpt-4o-mini", deps_type=Deps)

@agent.tool
async def search(ctx: RunContext[Deps], query: str) -> str:
    """Search KB."""
    return f"Results for {query}"

result = await agent.run("Find docs", deps=Deps(user_id="u1"))
```

## Docs

- [Quick Start](https://docs.rivailabs.com/quickstart)
- [Agents](https://docs.rivailabs.com/concepts/agents)
- [Tools](https://docs.rivailabs.com/concepts/tools)
- [Cookbook](https://docs.rivailabs.com/cookbook)
- [API Reference](https://docs.rivailabs.com/api/agent)
